series_metadata.series_description: This series includes the Alco-Sensor RBT III Study Guide, the BAC DataMaster Basic Training Manual, the BAC DataMaster Renewal Study Guide, the BAC DataMaster Study Review Questions, the BAC DataMaster Training Checklist, the BAC Verifier Renewal Study Guide, the BAC Verifier Study Review Questions, the BAC Verifier Training Checklist, the Intoxilyzer 5000 Basic Training Manual, the Intoxilyzer 5000 Renewal Study Guide, the Intoxilyzer 5000 Study Review Questions and the Intoxilyzer 5000 Training Checklist. These records are used in the training of the operation of the alcohol and drug testing equipment used by the Bureau of Alcohol and Drug Testing.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: The training information to be retained for three years following decertification date of the equipment., Paper: Shred
